title: Disabling status updates during triggered events

posts.author: melron (Thanasis Gkinis)
posts.cookedHtml:
I propose adding a feature that temporarily disables the “Status” column while associated triggers are executing, preventing unintended consequences and ensuring accurate task management.

Currently, users can quickly change the status of an item, potentially triggering multiple events or automations simultaneously. This can lead to confusion and complications in tracking tasks effectively.

To address this, my suggestion is to introduce a functionality that automatically disables the “Status” column while any associated automations are executing. The column would remain disabled until all triggers associated with that status have completed execution
